expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: The navigation category tab 'Hot Gam' is visibly cut off at the right edge, making the label unreadable. Users cannot see the full name of the category.

Multiple game card titles on the right side of each row are abruptly clipped (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE THE CURSE'), giving the appearance of broken or missing content rather than a scrollable carousel.

The horizontally scrollable game rows lack visible scroll affordance (no arrows, no scroll indicator), which may confuse users—especially those on non-touch devices—into thinking the layout is broken.
The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows 6 game tiles but the rightmost ones are partially hidden. Users may not realize there are 54 games available beyond what's visible.
The bottom navigation bar icon for 'Casino' appears to use a cherry/slot icon which is inconsistent in style compared to the other icons (cards, basketball, poker chip, megaphone, headset).

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions a misspelling of 'Jackpots' as 'Jacpots' or any spelling errors in text content.
